news.t: Obra Fund Management Launches Opportunistic Structured Products and High Grade Structured Products ETFs

overview.description: The Obra High Grade Structured Products ETF (OGSP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks income and capital preservation through an actively managed portfolio of investment grade securitized products selected based on fundamental, top-down analysis and bottom-up risk factors.   OGSP was launched on Apr 9, 2024 and is issued by Obra.

data.title: Obra Fund Management Launches Opportunistic Structured Products and High Grade Structured Products ETFs
data.text: Obra ETFs to Invest Opportunistically in a Wide Variety of Securitized Products that have Potential to Produce Income
